questions.rgb_answer: The landmark is the Pantheon, which is located in Rome, Italy. This can be inferred from the Latin inscription "MAGRI PPAL FECIT COSEIERTIVM FECIT," which translates to "Magistrate of the People built this." The Pantheon is a well-known historical building in Rome and is one of the most famous landmarks in Italy.
